class.name: InputHapticEffectRamp
class.brief_description: A haptic effect that represents a ramp force.
class.description: A haptic effect that represents a ramp force (with type of [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_RAMP]). A ramp force is a force with defined starting and ending magnitudes and a finite duration. A ramp force can continue in a single direction, or it can start as a strong push in one direction, weaken, stop, and then strengthen in the opposite direction. [b]Note:[/b] See [url=https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/desktop/ee418773(v=vs.85)]DirectInput documentation[/url] for more information.

members.member: Finishing strength of the effect (between [code]-1.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code]).
Starting strength of the effect (between [code]-1.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code]).
